Done. Here is a summary of what changed:

**`/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/sweeper_act.py`**

`_derive_status` was rewritten so the top-level `status` field is checked first. If it is one of `{'done', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'stale'}`, that value is returned immediately without inspecting the log. Only when the top-level status is absent or non-terminal does it fall through to the last log event.
